prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PIS-KIDSTEPEE-GRN Product Type: COLLAPSIBLE_PLAY_STRUCTURE Brand (from catalog): Parris Existing Title: Parris Kids Pretend Play Hut Pop Up Eagle Sunrise Teepee Water Resistant Nylon Description: Pretend like you're in the Wild Wild West with the Parris Kids Eagle Sunrise Play Hut Tepee.

This traditional style tepee is constructed of durable water resistant nylon fabric, making it ideal for indoor or outdoor play. It sets up just like a regular tent, and comes with strong PVC poles to create the frame. It measures about 3ft x 3ft x 4.5ft, making it a great size for little kids to pretend play in.

The floor of the tepee has a liner to keep it safe from scuff marks, and the door comes with ties so kids can really pretend like they are out on an adventure. It also features a vented screen for air circulation. The tepee can easily be taken down when playtime is over, and it comes with a convenient drawstring bag to keep parts organized and ready for travel. This is a must-have gift for young kids who love camping and the Wild Wild West. Search Terms: pretend play wild west child sized tepees nylon huts kids pop up tents camping Features: - TRADITIONAL STYLE PLAY HUT - Pop Up Eagle Sunrise Designed Tepee Perfect for Wild Wild West Pretend Play - DURABLE MATERIAL - Constructed of Water Resistant Nylon Fabric Ideal for Indoor or Outdoor Play | Vented Screen for Air Circulation - CHILD SIZED - 3ft x 3ft x 4.5ft (LWH) - Great for Children Ages 3 and Up | Floor Liner and Door Ties - EASY SET UP - Functions Like Regular Tent | Comes with Sturdy PVC Poles to Construct Frame - DRAW STRING CARRY BAG - Comes with Water Resistant Case to Keep Parts Organized and Ready for Travel === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
